page.protocol.policy.content:
一、信息收集

当您访问我们的网站时，我们可能会收集以下信息：

（1）您提供的个人信息，例如您的姓名、电子邮件地址、电话号码等；

（2）Cookie和其他技术自动收集的信息，例如您的IP地址、浏览器类型、访问时间和日期、您使用的设备类型等。


我们会使用这些信息来：

（1）回答您的查询；

（2）提供您要求的服务；

（3）处理订单和支付；

（4）发送更新和促销信息；

（5）改进我们的网站和服务；

（6）为您提供个性化的体验。


二、信息共享

我们可能会与以下第三方共享您的个人信息：

（1）为我们提供支持和服务的供应商和服务提供商；

（2）需要保护我们的权利、财产或安全的法律机构、监管机构、执法机构和政府机构。

*我们保证不会出售、交换或出租您的信息。我们会采取适当的措施来确保第三方接收您的个人信息的安全。


三、数据存储和安全

我们会采取合理的措施来保护您的个人信息，包括：

（1）采用密码保护、数据加密、物理和电子访问控制等技术来保护您的个人信息；

（2）在服务器上存储您的个人信息，并采取必要的安全措施来防止未经授权的访问、使用、修改、披露或破坏；

（3）定期检查和更新我们的安全措施，以确保其有效性。


四、Cookie和其他技术

我们可能会使用Cookie和其他技术来提高您的访问体验。例如，我们会使用Cookie来：

（1）记录您的登录信息；

（2）保存您的购物车信息；

（3）识别您的偏好和兴趣；

（4）收集有关网站使用情况的统计信息。

*您可以通过浏览器设置拒绝Cookie，但这可能会影响您的访问体验。


五、隐私权访问和更正

您可以随时访问和更正您的个人信息。如果您希望访问或更正您的信息，请通过我们的联系信息与我们联系。


六、隐私政策的修改

我们可能会定期更新本隐私政策。我们将在我们的网站上发布任何更改，并且您将被视为已接受更新后的隐私政策。
page.protocol.user.content:
一、引言

欢迎您使用飞贸Flytarde提供的服务。本协议是您与飞贸Flytarde之间的法律协议，详细阐述了您使用本公司提供的服务所需遵守的规定和条件。请您仔细阅读本协议，确保您已完全理解并接受了本协议的全部内容。如果您不同意本协议的任何条款，请勿使用本公司提供的服务。


二、定义

（1）服务：指飞贸Flytarde向用户提供的网络平台、技术、咨询、推广等服务。

（2）用户：指使用飞贸Flytarde提供的服务的个人或组织。


三、服务内容

（1）飞贸Flytarde将根据实际情况为用户提供相关服务，并为用户提供技术支持和帮助。

（2）飞贸Flytarde有权对其提供的服务进行升级、修改或增加新的服务，包括但不限于增加服务的收费标准。

（3）用户了解并同意，飞贸Flytarde提供的服务可能会受到各种因素的影响，如网络、技术、不可抗力等因素，因此，本公司无法保证服务的连贯性、及时性、安全性和准确性，用户应自行承担使用本公司服务所存在的风险。


四、用户责任

（1）用户应遵守中国相关法律法规，不得利用本公司提供的服务从事违法或不正当的活动，如发布违法信息、传播淫秽色情信息、侵犯他人知识产权等行为。

（2）用户应妥善保管自己的账号和密码，不得将其转让或出借给他人使用，如因用户的账号和密码被泄露而造成的损失，由用户自行承担。

（3）用户应保证其提供的信息真实、准确、完整、合法，如因用户提供虚假信息而导致的任何后果，由用户自行承担。


五、知识产权

（1）飞贸Flytarde拥有本公司提供的所有服务和软件的知识产权。

（2）用户使用本公司提供的服务仅限于个人使用，不得将其用于商业目的，不得非法复制、分发、传播、翻译、修改、编译、汇编、反编译、反汇编本公司所提供的软件。

六、免责声明

（1）用户理解并同意，飞贸Flytarde不对因不可抗力或其他无法控制的原因导致的服务中断或用户数据丢失承担责任。

（2）用户理解并同意，飞贸Flytarde不对用户因使用本公司服务而引起的任何间接、特殊、附带或后果性损失承担责任，包括但不限于利润、商业信誉、商业机会的损失。

（3）飞贸Flytarde对本公司提供的服务不作任何明示或暗示的担保，包括但不限于服务的适用性、无误性、及时性、安全性、完整性、保密性等。


七、协议修改

（1）飞贸Flytarde有权根据实际情况修改本协议的条款，一旦本协议发生变动，飞贸Flytarde将在其网站上公布最新的协议条款，用户应定期查看。

（2）如用户不同意本公司对协议条款所做的修改，应停止使用本公司的服务，如用户继续使用本公司服务，则视为已接受协议条款的修改。


八、法律适用与争议解决

（1）本协议的签订、执行和解释均适用中华人民共和国法律。

（2）如因本协议引起的任何争议，应通过友好协商解决，协商不成的，任何一方均可向有管辖权的法院提起诉讼。


飞贸Flytrade联系方式：

公司名称：深圳市启飞帆技术有限公司
中文简称：飞贸Flytrade
英文简称：Flytrade

电话：(86) 18903011871
地址：广东省深圳市龙华区

电子邮件：info@https://files.boldsaasify.com/16


以上为飞贸Flytarde的用户服务协议，请用户仔细阅读并遵守。如果您对本协议有任何疑问，请联系本公司客服人员。

page.protocol.faq.content.question: 我们在哪里？
page.protocol.faq.content.answer: 我们为全球范围内的智能手表服务提供总部位于迪拜，并在广州和深圳设有主要办公地址。如果您需要前来拜访，请通过发送电子邮件至info@https://files.boldsaasify.com/16与我们联系。

page.protocol.faq.content.question: 如何下订单？
page.protocol.faq.content.answer: 我们的网站目前仍在发展初期，暂不支持网站支付。我们的开发团队正在努力开发中，未来我们将会支持网站支付。如果您需要下单，请联系我们的销售经理，我们的销售团队会随时为您服务。

page.protocol.faq.content.question: 如何注册、如何登录、如何更改密码？
page.protocol.faq.content.answer:
如何注册？
在我们的网站首页右上角点击“用户ICON”的图标。
填写您的个人信息，包括电子邮件地址和密码。
阅读并同意我们的服务条款和隐私政策。
点击“注册”按钮。

如何登录？
在我们的网站首页点击“登录”按钮。
输入您的电子邮件地址和密码。
点击“登录”按钮。

如何更改密码？
在登录后，进入“我的账户”页面。
点击“更改密码”按钮。
输入当前密码和新密码，并确认新密码。
点击“更改密码”按钮，保存更改。

page.protocol.faq.content.question: 关于网站条款、联系我们、合作机会的问题？
page.protocol.faq.content.answer:
关于网站条款：
请访问我们网站的“隐私政策和用户服务协议”页面。

关于联系我们：
如果您需要帮助或有任何问题，请通过我们的网站联系页面与我们联系（info@https://files.boldsaasify.com/16）。我们的客户支持团队会尽快回复您的邮件。

关于合作机会：
如果您有与我们的业务有关的合作机会，请通过我们的网站联系页面与我们联系（info@https://files.boldsaasify.com/16）。我们将尽快回复您的邮件，提供一切资源为您服务，并与您讨论合作事宜。

page.protocol.faq.content.question: 如何提交问题、如何联系客户支持，以及相关解决方案？
page.protocol.faq.content.answer:
您可以通过我们的网站联系页面与我们联系（info@https://files.boldsaasify.com/16）。请尽可能详细地描述您遇到的问题，我们的客户支持团队会尽快回复您的邮件，并提供相关解决方案。

如何联系客户支持？

如果您需要帮助或有任何问题，请通过我们的网站联系页面与我们联系（info@https://files.boldsaasify.com/16）。我们的客户支持团队会尽快回复您的邮件，并提供相关解决方案。

相关解决方案？

我们的客户支持团队将根据您的问题提供相关的解决方案，并为您提供支持和帮助。我们也会在我们的网站FAQ中提供一些常见问题和解决方案，以帮助您更快地解决问题。

company.basic.work_location: 深圳市福田区华强北街道华航社区华强北路1019号华强广场C座
company.basic.company_introduce: Flytrade是一家总部位于迪拜的智能照明产品研发企业。他们专注于设计、制造和销售高质量的智能照明产品，包括LED照明系列，以满足节能环保的需求。Flytrade不断扩大市场份额，加强品牌推广和国际市场拓展，并提供优质的售后服务。他们致力于照明技术的创新和研发，为全球消费者提供先进、高效和环保的照明解决方案。
company.basic.company_mission:
为用户创造出色的产品
为员工营造愉悦进取的工作氛围
为合作伙伴建立互信共赢的合作平台
为股东提供长期稳健的回报
company.basic.company_vision: 我们的追求是成为一个全球领先的、持续发展和致力于健康事业的企业
company.basic.company_core: 以用户为导向，以设计驱动创新，不断学习进步

company.company_history.index.title: Establishment and Focus
company.company_history.index.description: Flytrade Lighting Company was established, focusing on the design, manufacturing, and sales of lighting products.

company.company_history.index.title: Market Research and Supplier Partnerships
company.company_history.index.description: The company began market research and competitive analysis to understand industry demands and trends. At the same time, partnerships were established with suppliers to prepare for the procurement of raw materials and lighting components

company.company_history.index.title: Launching Initial Product Series
company.company_history.index.description: Flytrade Lighting Company launched its initial product series, including pendant lights, table lamps, and wall lights. The products were sold through online platforms and local retailers to meet consumer demands.

company.company_history.index.title: Product Improvements and Brand Promotion
company.company_history.index.description: Based on market feedback and customer demands, the company made improvements and optimizations to its products. Brand promotion efforts were strengthened, and participation in industry exhibitions and lighting trade shows increased to enhance brand recognition.

company.company_history.index.title: Expansion of Production Scale and Partnerships
company.company_history.index.description: The company expanded its production scale by increasing production lines and the number of employees. Collaborative partnerships were established with domestic and international partners to expand the product supply chain and ensure product quality and stability of supply.

company.company_history.index.title: Introduction of LED Lighting Series
company.company_history.index.description: The company introduced LED lighting series to align with the trend of energy efficiency and environmental protection. The research and development team was strengthened to focus on innovative lighting design and technology, providing energy-efficient and environmentally friendly lighting solutions.

company.company_history.index.title: Recognition in Domestic Market and International Expansion
company.company_history.index.description: Flytrade Lighting Company gradually gained recognition in the domestic market. The company started exporting products to overseas markets and established partnerships with international distributors to expand international business.

company.company_history.index.title: Relocation to Larger Industrial Park
company.company_history.index.description: The company relocated to a larger industrial park and established a modern production base and showcase center. Research and development laboratories and quality inspection facilities were added to enhance product development and quality control capabilities.

company.company_history.index.title: Launch of Smart Lighting Products
company.company_history.index.description: The company launched a series of smart lighting products, integrating IoT technology and smart control systems to provide intelligent lighting solutions.

company.company_history.index.title: Becoming a Well-Known Brand and Product Line Expansion
company.company_history.index.description: Flytrade Lighting Company became a well-known brand in the industry. The product line continued to expand, including indoor lighting, outdoor lighting, and landscape lighting. After-sales services were strengthened to provide better customer support.

company.company_history.index.title: Dedication to Quality and Customer Service
company.company_history.index.description: We have always stayed true to our original mission, dedicated to serving consumers and producing lighting fixtures of superior quality.

pay.transfer.name: 深圳市启飞帆技术有限公司
pay.transfer.location: 上海浦东发展银行股份有限公司深圳西丽支行
page.protocol.sales.content:
欢迎光临飞贸Flytrade的官方网站！

在这里，我们为您提供高品质的产品和优质的服务。请在购买前仔细阅读以下销售政策：


1. 订单与付款：在我们的网站上下单即表示您同意购买所选的产品。我们将尽力确保网站上的产品信息准确无误，但如果出现错误，我们保留更正和取消订单的权利。我们接受多种付款方式，包括信用卡、借记卡、支付宝以及其他国际支付方式。您可以在结账页面选择您方便的付款方式。


2. 价格和货币：所有产品的价格以人民币（CNY）为基准，并根据市场行情进行调整。我们还支持其他主要货币，如美元（USD）、欧元（EUR）等。您可以在结账页面选择您希望使用的货币。请注意，货币汇率可能会导致最终价格与显示的价格略有不同。


3. 配送和运费：我们将尽力在收到付款后尽快处理和发货您的订单。配送时间取决于您所在的地区和选择的配送方式。运费将根据订单的重量、尺寸和目的地进行计算，并在结账页面显示。请注意，国际运输可能会产生额外的关税和税费，这些费用由购买者承担。


4. 退货和退款：如果您对收到的产品有任何质量问题，请在收到货物后的7个工作日内与我们联系。我们将尽力解决问题并提供退货或退款服务。退货时，产品必须处于原始状态，并附有完整的包装和配件。退款将在确认收到退货并检查后进行处理。


5. 隐私保护：我们非常重视您的个人信息的保护。在您使用我们的网站时，我们会采取适当的安全措施来保护您的信息，并仅在必要的情况下使用您的信息。请阅读我们的隐私政策以了解更多关于我们如何收集、使用和保护您的个人信息的信息。


*如果您对以上销售政策有任何疑问或需要进一步的帮助，请随时通过以下联系方式与我们取得联系：

  • 邮箱：info@https://files.boldsaasify.com/16
  • 手机：(86) 18903011871

感谢您选择飞贸Flytrade！我们期待为您提供卓越的产品和服务。


请注意，以上销售政策可能会根据需要进行调整和更新。最新版本的销售政策将始终在我们的网站上公布。
page.protocol.cookie.content:
${company_name} and its global affiliates] (collectively, “we”, “us” or “our”) understand that your privacy is important to you and are committed to being transparent about the technologies it uses. We use cookies and similar technologies for a wide range of purposes in our websites. This Cookie Policy (the “Policy”) will inform you what cookies are, what cookies are used by us, our partners and/or third parties (if any), why we use cookies, how we use cookies, and how you can manage cookies or realize your relevant rights. This Policy constitutes a part of our Privacy Policy, and you may refer to our Privacy Policy for any matters not covered by this Policy.


We use cookies in order to provide you with an enhanced browsing experience and services better adapted to your particular needs and interests. Some of the cookies are necessary in order for you to log in, remember your preferences and for the proper display of our web pages. Other cookies offer valuable feedback on how the website is used, enabling us to increase its efficiency and accessibility.

1. What are “cookies”?

Cookies are text files containing small amounts of information which are automatically downloaded to your computer or device when you visit a website. They are created when your browser loads a website. The website sends information to the browser which creates a text file. Each time you are visiting a website, the browser retrieves this file and sends it to the website’s server.


Cookies are useful because they allow a website to recognize a user’s device over time. They can be used for lots of purposes, such as responding to your actions, remembering your preferences, personalizing your online experience, and generally improving the user experience. They can also help to ensure that the advertisements you see online are more relevant to you and your interests. The cookie itself does not in most cases identify you.


We may use both session cookies and persistent cookies. A session cookie is a cookie that is automatically deleted when the user closes his browser, while a persistent cookie is a cookie that remains stored in the user’s terminal device until it reaches a defined expiration date (which can be minutes, days or several years in the future). We may use both first-party cookies and third-party cookies as well. A first-party cookie is set by the data controller (or any of its processors) operating the website visited by the user, as defined by the URL that is usually displayed in the browser address bar, while a third-party cookie is set by data controllers that do not operate the website currently visited by the user.

2. What kinds of cookies do we use and what they are used for?

We use different types of cookies which have different purposes. Depending on the purposes for which they are used, cookies used by us can be categorized as the following types.

-Essential Cookies

These cookies are necessary for you to use our website and cannot be switched off in our systems. Essential cookies are required to enable the basic functions of this site and guarantee the security and efficiency of the service required. These cookies are usually set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as logging in, requesting website visual elements and pages resources, filling in forms or adding goods to the shopping cart. Without these cookies, services you have asked for cannot be properly provided.


For instance, these cookies may be used on our websites to:
•Help you complete user authentication and user login.
•Help you complete the subscribe process.

-Functionality Cookies

These cookies are used to provide you with enhanced functionality and improve your browsing experience. These cookies may remember certain choices you have made, such as your language preference, your region, your username and password. These cookies may be set by us or by third-party providers who provide services on our pages. If you do not allow these cookies, some of these services may not function properly, and we may not be able to provide you with better personalization on user experience.


For instance, these cookies may be used on our websites to:
•Remember your country or region and remember your language.
•Ensure the normal operation of customer services system.
•Provide the short message service and information pushing service.

-Analytical Cookies

These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. These cookies may collect information about how you use our websites, such as which page you visit and which link you click on. These cookies help us to know which goods or pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the website. These cookies also help us understand how our services are doing and improve them by developing new features. If you do not allow these cookies, we may not be able to monitor its performance and improve your experience accordingly.


For instance, these cookies may be used on our websites to:
•Record the distribution channels and analyze the source of users.
•Analyze and improve the performance and design of our websites and products.
•Analyze the popularity of our websites and products.
•Calculate and analyze the traffic and audience of our websites.
•Analyze and improve the effectiveness of our advertising.

-Marketing Cookies

These cookies can track your online activities and are used to make advertisements more relevant to you. These cookies may be set through our website by our advertising partners, which can be used to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant advertisements. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.


For instance, these cookies may be used on our websites to:
•Provide content, recommendations and advertisements that are more relevant to users.
•Personalize and target marketing communications effectively.
•Limit the number of times the user see an advertisement and help to measure the effectiveness of advertising campaigns

3. How we share cookies information with third parties?

First-party cookies are set by us or our data processors operating our websites, while third-party cookies are set and controlled by data controllers other than us that do not operate our websites directly.


Your use of our websites may result in some third-party cookies being downloaded to your computer or device and some cookies information being shared with third parties. This may occur when the website you are visiting makes use of third-party analytics or marketing tools or includes content displayed from third-party websites. We do not control the storage or access to these cookies. You can review the privacy policies and cookie policies of these third-party service providers to find out how these third parties use cookies and relevant personal data. The list of the third parties who place cookies on our websites can be found in the afore-mentioned Cookie List.

4. How to manage cookie settings?

You can change your preferences regarding cookies or withdraw your consent for the use of cookies at any time by clicking Cookie Settings on the bottom of the webpage. You can select the types of cookies you consent us to use.


We remind you that the cookies you accepted previously might remain stored in your browser. If you wish to remove the cookies already set, you can do this by deleting these cookies via your browser. Most browsers allow you to manage how cookies are set and used, and you may also adjust your browser settings to manage cookies on a site-by-site basis.

5. How to contact us?

We may update this Policy from time to time and please visit this Policy regularly to stay informed about our use of cookies. If you have any questions about our use of cookies or other similar technologies, please contact us at:
${company_name}
${company_address}
${email}

page.common.footer_data.title: About us
page.common.footer_data.content:
Established in 2018, ICON. AMSTERDAM is all about standing out from the crowd and staying unique.

In just a few years, the Amsterdam-based label is now part of the Dutch capital’s burgeoning streetwear scene and a leading global destination for the latest menswear.
